name: Lenovo ThinkPad EC/BIOS identifier family
description: Lenovo ThinkPad firmware measurements extend EV_S_CRTM_VERSION into PCR 0 with a UTF-16LE-encoded ID string of the form `Nxxxx Hw (BIOS revision)` or `NnnnHT06W` style depending on firmware generation. The first 4-5 characters encode the model family.
notes: Lenovo extends PCR 0 with the UTF-16LE-encoded `N<model>HT<revision>' string. `dev_tpm_tcg' decodes it into `pcrs/0/derived/crtm-version' as UTF-8. A policy engine can prefix-match on the first 3-4 chars to identify the platform family. Lenovo's EK root CA chain is `Lenovo ThinkPad TPM Root CA' → `Lenovo ThinkPad TPM EK Certificate`; obtain from https://pki.lenovo.com/.
source: Lenovo ThinkPad service manuals + observed PCR 0 measurements on Linux kernel 6.x hosts.
